_note: Token values confirmed from Figma MCP extraction. Three states: full, middle, state3.

--button/default/bg-default.description: Button background fill. Dark pill. Same across all timer states.

fillOverlay._note: TODO: Confirm the exact design token for the fill overlay background color.

blendMode.description: Blend mode applied to the fill overlay layer. Progressively darkens the button as the overlay grows left to right.

full.description: State: full. Timer just started. No fill visible.

middle.description: State: middle. Timer approximately halfway through. ~48.5% of button width covered.

state3.description: State: state3. Timer nearly expired. Entire button width covered.

--text/invert.description: Label text color. mix-blend-difference is applied so it inverts against both the dark background and the darkened fill overlay.

--font-family/headings.description: Label font family. NOTE: This component uses the headings font, not the body font.

borderRadius.description: Applied to container for full pill shape.

full._note: Confirmed. Fill overlay width: 0px. Timer at start, full time remaining.

middle._note: Confirmed. Fill overlay width: ~147px (~48.5%). Timer approximately halfway.

state3._note: Confirmed. Fill overlay width: 303px. Timer nearly expired, full button darkened.

disabled._note: TODO: Not defined in Figma. Confirm appearance and token values.

focus._note: TODO: Not defined in Figma. Confirm focus ring treatment.
